# 🤔  Confused by Google Analytics?

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-09-18 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 100

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you struggling to find the exact metrics and insights you
need inside Google Analytics?

Google Analytics is powerful, but it can be overwhelming to use,
even for experienced marketers!

I know it can be difficult to find exactly what you're looking
for in all the different reports. And, with the new Google
Analytics 4, you actually have to create many of the reports on
your own with exploration tools.

Why spend a lot of time learning how to use Google Analytics when
you could better focus your time on actually growing your
website?

With MonsterInsights WordPress reports, you no longer have to
leave your site or navigate through Analytics to uncover your
most important analytics data.

MonsterInsights brings all your important Google Analytics data
inside your WordPress admin area, and shows you how your website
is performing at a glance.

Here’s a look at what reports you can get in your WordPress
admin:

👉 Your Ultimate Guide to MonsterInsights Dashboard Reports 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9yojLBqFcx-hYfQu6HuZMMqFlHd17hs32sxKZvIOVbw )
 👈

So what are you waiting for?

Give the dashboard reports a try today by upgrading for 50% off 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iva2rFQYxJewjg04Kb2RcpRGhJ0MxZ3KNeSsvXZ3cws )
 and get ready to make data-driven decisions.

Until next time,

Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator
